name: mf2-common
description: MF2 common subset expected to parse across the MF2 parser targets.

cases.description: Single selector message with input declaration.
Local declaration used as a selector.

cases.source: This is a long plain text message that contains no placeholders at all. It exists so the parser core can be measured on a text-heavy input that exercises the text-run scan path rather than the delimiter handling. The MF2 grammar text-char production covers almost every Unicode codepoint, so realistic translation strings stay in this fast path for the bulk of their length.
cases.description: Long plain-text message with no placeholders (text-run scan path).

cases.source: Dear {$customer}, thank you for your recent purchase on {$siteName}. Your order number is {$orderId} and we expect delivery to {$shippingAddress} within a few business days. If you have any questions, please reply to this email.
cases.description: Long text interleaved with several variable placeholders.
